title: Verify Trial Corner displays Hero section with accurate trial status
description: Test that the Hero section shows correct trial status, remaining days, and trial promise
preconditions: User is on Trial Corner page

steps.description: 3. Verify trial status text is displayed
4. Verify remaining days count is accurate
5. Verify 'Easy cancellation anytime' promise text is visible

expected_result: Hero section displays 'Your ₹1 trial is active', correct remaining days, and promise copy
